# Lunar Cycles of Spiritual Growth
## Scripture
"In him was life, and that life was the light of all mankind. The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it." - John 1:4-5

## Reflection
As we observe the phases of the moon, we notice its constant transformation, from new moon to full moon and back again. This cycle reminds us of our own spiritual journey, where we experience growth, renewal, and transformation. Just as the moon reflects the light of the sun, our lives reflect the light of Christ. In times of darkness, when we feel lost or uncertain, we can trust that God's light is still shining, guiding us forward. The lunar cycle encourages us to be patient, to trust in God's timing, and to seek His light in every phase of our spiritual journey.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, thank you for the lunar cycles that remind us of our spiritual growth. May we reflect Your light in our lives, just as the moon reflects the sun's light. Help us to trust in Your timing and to seek Your guidance in every phase of our journey. As we navigate the darkness, may Your light shine brightly, overcoming any darkness and illuminating our path. May we grow in faith, hope, and love, reflecting Your glory to the world. Amen.
